title: Validate Zephyr firmware on fleet AMI
description: Prove end-to-end that private fleet AMI ami-0764d1b512e22671f runs the actual LICHEN Zephyr+C firmware in Renode. Build a current Renode-targeted Zephyr ELF using the development builder/EBS, launch a clean fleet instance without attaching that EBS or installing runtimes, transfer the ELF and tracked Renode platform/peripheral files, boot it with /usr/local/bin/renode, and capture firmware boot logs plus successful lichen-sim connection or packet exchange. Verify Serial Console/SSH diagnostics remain available, then terminate all temporary resources.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Current tracked LICHEN Zephyr firmware builds successfully for a supported Renode board. 2. A clean instance launched from ami-0764d1b512e22671f loads and boots that ELF with tracked platform/peripheral files and no runtime installation or development EBS attachment. 3. Captured logs prove firmware execution beyond ELF load and at least one lichen-sim connection or packet exchange. 4. Commands, artifact revision, logs, AMI ID, instance type, and cleanup evidence are recorded. 5. All temporary instances, volumes, keys, and security groups are removed.
notes: Validated current Zephyr+C firmware based on source revision 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364 on private fleet AMI ami-0764d1b512e22671f (c7g.xlarge, Renode 1.16.1). Historical project-LICHEN-r7h4.5 had passed older firmware at c3dd4d5/df3cf92; current firmware added MCUboot, USB, Native, MCUmgr, and L2/CoAP. Regression sequence: official Renode first stalled on unsupported nRF SPIM STOP/STOPPED, then on USBD EVENTCAUSE. Renode-scoped fixes use legacy nordic,nrf-spi/easyDMA false and disable USB_DEVICE_STACK_NEXT, LICHEN_NATIVE, and MCUMGR_TRANSPORT_UART in renode_console.conf. Third run booted but dev provisioning returned -EAGAIN because active lichen_l2_enable(false) declared stop_ret but returned unrelated uninitialized outer ret, leaving Zephyr NET_IF_UP stale after a successful stop. Final code fix changes the disable return to stop_ret, matching historical intent and the mirrored firmware/bridge-zephyr control flow. Final Zephyr build passed for t_echo/nrf52840 with CONFIG_NRFX_SPI1=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_L2=y, CONFIG_UART_CONSOLE=y; SPIM1/USB/Native/MCUmgr UART disabled. Final ELF SHA-256 75912f6657aab318eab188e10b73177d28921c5c103affdc2138a4aaa7307693; flash 160920 B, RAM 74820 B; VTOR 0x32200, SP 0x2000e5c0, PC 0x00035bed. Clean fleet validator harness asserted Booting Zephyr OS, LICHEN puck starting, Connected to lichen-sim, and sim.metrics.transmissions=3 without runtime installation or development EBS attachment. Final local evidence: /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/lichen-7i0p-final.elf, lichen-7i0p-final-uart.log, lichen-7i0p-final-renode.log, lichen-7i0p-final-renode-stdio.log. Three independent review passes found the swallowed stop error; after correction, a second three-pass round confirmed Renode portability and identified only a pre-existing abort-only state contract tracked as project-LICHEN-jct9. Builder drift (missing documented bootstrap-host.sh) tracked as project-LICHEN-uc7m. Cleanup: validator i-02b42f8916930bd83 and builder i-0eaec6fe82cfa8701 terminated; temporary SG sg-0b2ef4c11837e3f4b deleted; persistent vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb synced, unmounted, detached, and verified available with no attachments.
close_reason: Validated current T-Echo Zephyr firmware end-to-end on fleet AMI ami-0764d1b512e22671f. Added Renode-scoped legacy SPI/USB overrides and fixed lichen_l2 disable returning an uninitialized value. Final ELF 75912f6657aab318eab188e10b73177d28921c5c103affdc2138a4aaa7307693 booted Zephyr/puck, connected to lichen-sim, and produced 3 measured transmissions. Three-pass reviews completed twice; abort recovery and EBS bootstrap drift tracked in project-LICHEN-jct9 and project-LICHEN-uc7m. All temporary AWS resources removed and persistent EBS verified available/unattached.
